task_objective: Address code review findings from the Single Responsibility Principle (SRP) decomposition of SDHLudusaviService.
design_decisions: Removed unused limit parameter in DiagnosticLogBuffer.__init__.
Prefixed fallback debug logging with '[DEBUG]' to preserve log level semantics in output.
Eliminated sys.modules and __code__ identity trampolining in watchdog.py signaling helpers.
Re-exported watchdog helper functions (_read_ppid and _process_tree) from service.py for backward compatibility with existing tests.
Redirected AST checks and process tree/os.kill monkeypatches in test_service.py to target watchdog.py canonically.
Cloned combined state dictionaries in load_all to prevent aliasing bugs.
Replaced production asserts with RuntimeErrors to preserve check execution under optimize (-O) builds.
Resolved TOCTOU race condition in run_locked by acquiring the lock first, then checking and releasing if operation is already running.
Delegated diagnostics logging upward from gateway.py to service.py and removed circular delegation and property calls.
Restored 10 operation history integration tests in test_history_integration.py covering skips, reload, and error caching.
results: All 344 tests passed successfully. Ruff check and format pass completely. Ty checks pass with zero diagnostics. Commit c60ede3 successfully created.
